case_title: DENIA MEJIA ORTIZ VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-04-2024 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO FEB-08-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY NICHELLE FLENTROY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CURTIS KARNOW ; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
